WEBPHONE.CONTACT_INVALID: Contact does not exist on WhatsApp
WEBPHONE.ERROR_TO_MADE_CALL: An error occurred while trying to call

PERMISSIONS.TITLE: Enable microphone
PERMISSIONS.DESCRIPTION: Allow access to your microphone so you can receive and place voice calls.
PERMISSIONS.ERROR: We could not access your microphone. Please allow it in your browser settings.

AUDIO_PLAYBACK.TITLE: Enable call audio
AUDIO_PLAYBACK.DESCRIPTION: Click allow so the browser can play call audio.
AUDIO_PLAYBACK.ERROR: We could not play the call audio. Please allow audio playback in your browser.
